text: Hello. Hello. Can you hear me? Yes, can you hear me? Hey, glad to hear you. I'm James from Know the Healthcare of South Carolina. I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that may help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital stay. So to check your eligibility, can you please share your age?
